content.title: Broom-Finished Concrete
content.tagline: Color Meets Texture in Every Stroke
content.subtitle: Classic, Durable, and Timeless
content.description: Integral pigment blended with a brushed texture for a finish that adds warmth, character, and slip resistance to any outdoor surface.

content.title: The Classic Concrete Finish with a Hint of Personality
content.description:
Looking to go beyond the standard gray? Colored broom-finished concrete adds vibrance, safety, and style to your outdoor spaces — a perfect balance of practical texture and visual appeal.

Ideal for patios, driveways, sidewalks, porches, and steps, this finish combines a rich palette of colors with a slip-resistant broom texture, creating surfaces that are both stunning and functional.

cards.title: Color Integration:
cards.subtitle: Pigments are added directly into the concrete mix or applied as a surface hardener, resulting in consistent, fade-resistant tones throughout the slab.

cards.title: Broom Texture:
cards.subtitle: A broom is pulled across the surface before curing, producing fine grooves that enhance traction and safety, especially in wet conditions.

content.title: What Is Colored Broom-Finished Concrete?
content.finalText: The result? A timeless, practical surface with added warmth, depth, and character.
content.description: This technique merges two of the most reliable finishing methods — integral coloring and broom texturing.

items.text: The textured surface helps prevent slipping, making it perfect for driveways, pool decks, patios, and walkways.
items.label: Slip-Resistant Safety:

items.text: When installed by Maxima Concrete using our 6.5-bag high-strength mix, broom-finished concrete resists wear, cracking, and harsh weather — lasting for decades with minimal maintenance.
items.label: Long-Lasting Durability:

items.text: A quick rinse or light wash keeps it clean year-round. For added longevity, a periodic resealing enhances stain resistance and color retention.
items.label: Low Maintenance:

items.text: It's one of the most cost-effective finishes, offering excellent value without compromising appearance or performance.
items.label: Affordable & Versatile:

cards.title: Driveways
cards.description: Add curb appeal with rich color and reliable traction.

cards.title: Patios
cards.description: Create cozy, inviting areas with earthy tones or bold accents.

cards.title: Sidewalks & Walkways
cards.description: Blend functionality with design, enhancing both safety and beauty.

cards.title: Porches & Steps
cards.description: Slip-resistant and long-lasting under daily use.

content.title: Where to Use Broom-Finished Concrete
content.subtitle: This finish is suitable for virtually any flatwork application:
content.finalText: No matter the project, Maxima Concrete ensures every broom-finished surface is perfectly graded, properly cured, and beautifully detailed.

items.question: What is a colored broom finish?
items.answer: It combines the slip-resistant texture of a broom finish with integral color, giving you a durable surface with added warmth and character.

items.question: Will the color fade over time?
items.answer: Integral color is mixed throughout the concrete and holds up well. Periodic resealing helps keep it rich and vibrant for years.

items.question: Where does a colored broom finish work best?
items.answer: It's a popular choice for driveways, patios, walkways, and porches where you want both texture and a custom color.

items.question: How do I maintain it?
items.answer: Clean as needed and reseal every 2–3 years to protect both the color and the surface.
